issues.description: TrashFromHand should not have a cardType filter. The effect says 'trash 1 card from your hand' (any card), not specifically Characters. The filter should be removed or be empty.

The structure uses thenActions as if trashing is conditional, but the effect text says 'You may trash 1 card' making the entire action optional. The DSL should use a conditional wrapper or optional flag at the action level, not nest KO as a thenAction of trash.
The effect is optional ('You may trash'). The DSL needs to reflect this optionality, likely through an optional property or conditional structure.
